entry.title: Re: Create button unavailable in SAP RAP ODATA V4
entry.content: How do we implement create button if we decide to not use draft with RAP and V4 ?

entry.title: Re: How can I use @impl flag with typescript in cap?
entry.content: That solved it, thanks 🙂

entry.title: 🇪🇸 SAP CodeJam BTP: Connecting systems and services using SAP Integration Suite (Valencia, Spain)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam instance will be about SAP Integration Suite and how we can use it to connect systems and services in our landscape. Join us for this 4-hour event of developer networking and hands-on learning in Valencia, Spain.

By the end of the CodeJam, we will achieve an integration scenario like the one below in the diagram.

If you are interested in knowing what we will develop during the event, check out the Connecting Systems and Services using SAP Integration Suite CodeJam GitHub repo -  https://github.com/SAP-samples/connecting-systems-services-integration-suite-codejam. The repository contains the details of the integration scenario we will go through during the event.

This is a free hands-on, in-person event only (not virtual) and takes place Tuesday, the 16th of April 2024, in Valencia, Spain at the Edificio Aqua, C/ de Menorca, 19, planta, 5º, Camins al Grau, 46023 Valencia. The event is kindly being hosted by Seidor, thank you!

Note: We will be running the SAP Build CodeJam, the day after (17th of April, different location - Universitat Politècnica de València (UPV) - Facultad Administración y Dirección de Empresas, Camino de Vera, s/n Edificio 7J, 46022 Valencia). You can check out the details and register here - https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/sap-build-create-apps-and-processes-without-coding-valencia-spain/ev-p/13628251.

The instructor is Developer Advocate Antonio Maradiaga.

There are essential prerequisites that every attendee must complete before arriving at the event location. You can find the prerequisites here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/connecting-systems-services-integration-suite-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md.

If you wish to attend, please indicate that using the "I'm attending" facility on this page. Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 30 attendees for this event. In that context, if you indicate that you're attending and later realise you can't, please remove your name so that others get a chance instead. Thanks!

Location:
Oficinas de Seidor Valencia
Edificio Aqua, C/ de Menorca, 19
planta, 5º, Camins al Grau
46023 Valencia

entry.title: Add field with more than 80 characters in Custom Object Builder
entry.content:
Hello all,

We have created an object via the custom object builder. The only data type available for text fields is "Description", which is automatically interpreted as LANGUAGEINDEPENDENT_MEDIUM_Description with a length of 80.

But now we would need new fields with a length of 120 or even more (extended). Is this possible for an existing CBO? I cannot find a corresponding option in either the Builder in the frontend or in the cloud application studio.

Thanks in advance,

Kind regards,
Thomas

entry.title: HR_TIME_RESULTS_IN_INTERVAL How to restrict the data from the zes table to a certain date?
entry.content:
So I need to extract data from the zes table from the b2 cluster, I used HR_TIME_RESULTS_IN_INTERVAL to do so. However I want to restrict the data to a certain date. But the zes table only has the field reday, which only gives me the number of the day, no month nor year.

How would i manage to restrict it for example march 12th 2024 and not the 12th of every month? 

My code: 

DATA: wa_tim_b2 TYPE hrf_tim_b2,
      v_date TYPE d.

DATA: time_results    TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ptm_time_results,
      time_results_wa LIKE LINE OF time_results.

DATA: zes   LIKE pc2b6 OCCURS 0 WITH HEADER LINE.

DATA: lt_personnel_numbers TYPE TABLE OF pa0001-pernr,
      ls_personnel_number TYPE pa0001-pernr,
      ls_employee_details TYPE pa0001.


PARAMETERS: p_date TYPE sy-datum,
            p_ztart TYPE pt_ztart.



v_date = p_date.


SELECT pernr FROM pa0001 INTO TABLE lt_personnel_numbers.

*LOOP AT lt_personnel_numbers INTO ls_personnel_number.

LOOP AT lt_personnel_numbers INTO ls_personnel_number.

CLEAR ls_employee_details.
CLEAR time_results[].

        CALL FUNCTION 'HR_TIME_RESULTS_IN_INTERVAL'
      EXPORTING
        int_pernr             = ls_personnel_number
        int_begda             = v_date
        int_endda             = v_date
*        incl_interim_result   = sw_pr         "Note 2943342
      TABLES
        int_time_results      = time_results
      EXCEPTIONS
        wrong_cluster_version = 1
        no_read_authority     = 2
        cluster_archived      = 3
        technical_error       = 4
        OTHERS                = 5.
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.

      ENDIF.


        CLEAR: zes[].                        "L9CK006744
        CLEAR: zes.                              "L9CK006744
        LOOP AT time_results INTO time_results_wa.
          APPEND LINES OF time_results_wa-zes   TO zes.
        ENDLOOP.

        LOOP AT zes.
          IF zes-ztart EQ p_ztart.
     SELECT SINGLE * FROM pa0001 INTO ls_employee_details WHERE pernr = ls_personnel_number.
      IF sy-subrc = 0.
        WRITE: / ls_employee_details-ename, zes-reday, zes-ztart, zes-anzhl.
      ELSE.
        WRITE: / 'Employee data not found for PERNR:', ls_personnel_number.
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.


ENDLOOP.

entry.title: Can't manage to get data for my chart in my Object Page with annotation.xml
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm pretty new in SAP BTP development so I may not use the right terms.

My final goal is to display a chart in a object page.

My problem : The chart remains empty (I have data in backend).
My empty chart

I follow this tutorial for inspiration : https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/fiori-tools-configure-object-pages.html, but I don't understand why it is working with this example and not mine.

If I display another Facet just before with BillingStatus and NetAmount displayed by default, results is different (but still false because I have just the amount of first order for each BillingStatus and not the sum of all).
Chart fill but incorrectly

here is my data in backend, i am using GWSAMPLE_BASIC service and BusinessPartnerSet entitySet.

{
	"d": {
		"__metadata": {
			"id": "GWSAMPLE_BASIC/BusinessPartnerSet('0100000006')",
		},
		"ToSalesOrders": {
			"results": [
				{
					"SalesOrderID": "0500000003",
					"NetAmount": "1431.97",
					"BillingStatus": "",
					"BillingStatusDescription": "Initial"
				},
				{
					"SalesOrderID": "0500000004",
					"NetAmount": "639.70",
					"BillingStatus": "",
					"BillingStatusDescription": "Initial"
				},
				{
					"SalesOrderID": "0500000013",
					"NetAmount": "6938.00",
					"BillingStatus": "",
					"BillingStatusDescription": "Initial"
				},
				{
					"SalesOrderID": "0500000014",
					"NetAmount": "2907.00",
					"BillingStatus": "P",
					"BillingStatusDescription": "Paid"
				}
			]
		}
	}
}

 DB Table SNWD_SO

Annotation.xml (to simplify reading, I've cut the content to the section that seems to correspond to my problem)

<Annotations Target="GWSAMPLE_BASIC.BusinessPartner">
	 <Annotation Term="UI.FieldGroup" Qualifier="TechnicalData">
		<Record>
			<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Label mais où ?" />
			<PropertyValue Property="Data">
				<Collection>
					<Record Type="UI.DataField">
						<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="BusinessPartnerID" />
					</Record>
					<Record Type="UI.DataField">
						<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="LegalForm" />
						<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="test Label"/>
					</Record>
				</Collection>
			</PropertyValue>
		</Record>
	</Annotation>
	<Annotation Term="UI.Facets">
		<Collection>
			<Record Type="UI.ReferenceFacet">
				<PropertyValue Property="ID" String="TechData" />
				<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="@UI.FieldGroup#TechnicalData" />
				<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Onglet 1" />
			</Record>
			<!-- This facet is displayed as a section -->
			<!--
			<Record Type="UI.ReferenceFacet">
				<PropertyValue Property="ID" String="OSID1"/>
				<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Onglet Commandes 1"/>
				<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="ToSalesOrders/@UI.LineItem#SO_ONE" />
			</Record>
			-->
			<Record Type="UI.ReferenceFacet">
				<PropertyValue Property="ID" String="chartByBilling" />
				<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Chart SO" />
				<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="ToSalesOrders/@UI.Chart#BillingStatus" />
			</Record>
		</Collection>
	</Annotation>
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="GWSAMPLE_BASIC.SalesOrder" >
	<Annotation Term="UI.LineItem" Qualifier="SO_ONE">
	 <Collection>
			<Record Type="UI.DataField">
				<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="SalesOrderID" />
				<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="SID ONE" />
			</Record>
			<Record Type="UI.DataField">
				<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="NetAmount" />
			</Record>
			<Record Type="UI.DataField">
				<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="BillingStatus" />
			</Record>
		</Collection>
	</Annotation>
	<Annotation Term="UI.Chart" Qualifier="BillingStatus">
		<Record Type="UI.ChartDefinitionType">
			<PropertyValue Property="Title" String="Revenue by billing"/>
			<PropertyValue Property="Description" String="Revenue by Billing Status"/>
			<PropertyValue Property="ChartType" EnumMember="UI.ChartType/Column"/>
			<PropertyValue Property="Dimensions">
				<Collection>
					<PropertyPath>BillingStatus</PropertyPath>
				</Collection>
			</PropertyValue>
			<PropertyValue Property="DimensionAttributes">
				<Collection>
					<Record Type="UI.ChartDimensionAttributeType">
						<PropertyValue Property="Dimension" PropertyPath="BillingStatus"/>
						<PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartDimensionRoleType/Category"/>
					</Record>
				</Collection>
			</PropertyValue>
			<PropertyValue Property="Measures">
				<Collection>
					<PropertyPath>NetAmount</PropertyPath>
				</Collection>
			</PropertyValue>
			<PropertyValue Property="MeasureAttributes">
				<Collection>
					<Record Type="UI.ChartMeasureAttributeType">
						<PropertyValue Property="Measure" PropertyPath="NetAmount"/>
						<PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartMeasureRoleType/Axis1"/>
						<PropertyValue Property="DataPoint" AnnotationPath="@UI.DataPoint#NetAmount"/>
					</Record>
				</Collection>
			</PropertyValue>
		</Record>
	</Annotation>
	<Annotation Term="UI.DataPoint" Qualifier="NetAmount">
		<Record>
			<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="NetAmount"/>
			<PropertyValue Property="Title" String="Net Amount"/>
		</Record>
	</Annotation>
</Annotations>

I try many other ways to describe my chart.
I try with tool "Guided Development">Add a smart chart facet to an object page.
Nothing seems to works.

 

I'm pretty lost even I think it might be an silly mistake of mine.

Thanks for any help,

Best regards.

entry.title: How to get "full control" on columns design in a SAP Analytics cloud table ?
entry.content:
Hello.

I'm trying to build a table in a planning story with the below requirement for columns sequence : 

 

  VersionActual            Actual Forecast Forecast
  MeasureGranted
amount		Consumed           ConsumedRemainingConsumed Consumed
  Date202320230120230220230320230420230520230620230720230820230920231020231120231220232023202401---> 202412
ProjectAccounts                   
ABCD65000000 10 000 000100 000100 000100 000100 000100 000100 000100 000100 000100 000100 000100 000100 0001 200 0008 800 000120 000 120 000
 66000000                   
                     
EFGH65000000                   
 66000000                   

 

I'm exploring what can be done with cross calculation with mitigated success so far.

Would be great to find a way to be able to manage entirely each column independantly, because the table is not "symetric", and granularity is not constant ...

The first measure "granted amount" is used only in first column of data.

All actuals columns are coming from an S/4 Import connection.

If i just drag and drop version / date / measures in columns I get a neverending list of all possible combinations between those 2 dimensions and measures.

Is there a way to force measure to behave like a dimension ?

There is several versions of forecast, driven by an input control in the story. And there is a period filter that should be used to offset all date selection.

The goal is also that forecast (version) columns are dynamic and actuals columns always stay actuals of course.

Thanks in advance for your advices.

(EDIT : picture of the table added, maybe more readable ... green is actual, yellow is plan)

Regards.

Guillaume P.

entry.title: Re: How can I access the parameters of objects?
entry.content:
You can find the set/get parameters in SE80 (e.g. by package) or looking at table TPARA

  • You can execute a where-used search on those, they can be linked to/used by programs, dynpros, data element, etc.

Else, could you explain your requirement 'How can we access the IDs'

entry.title: Re: Asset down payment acquisition reversal issue
entry.content: Did you set the negative values allowed flag? You can find the flag in the depreciation area.

entry.title: Re: Deprecated features in Latest Goal Management
entry.content:
@VanessaLi  and @Sam_Passman ,

Thanks again to both of you for your time and your replies.

We have now done some more testing and research on our side. Here are our findings:

  1. One of the fields in the table in our Tasks is 'completed' (a bool checkbox field). This is a standard field but is turns out that it is not reportable (confirmed in a support ticket). This means that for this field, in thousands of live goals, we cannot export this field, to then later import it to a Milestones field for use in the Latest Goal Mgt.
  2. According to the documentation, for Milestones and the Latest Goal Mgt, the 'completed' field, checkboxes and bool fields are all unsupported anyway. So even if we could export the contents of this existing 'completed' field, we should not import it to the Milestones anyway.

So it is not possible for us to transfer all the information in our goal plans from tasks to milestones, as suggested.

As mentioned before, our 2024 forms have been live since mid-2023, as we roll up the forms for the new starters in the second part of 2023, into a 2024 form.

Users will still need to edit their 2024 goals and tasks into February 2025, as the deadline for completion is end Feb. 2025.

I will go ahead and create new forms for 2025 with milestones instead of tasks: No problem (except that we can no longer use the completed field). But for the 2024 forms I do not see a way to get them to work with the Latest Goal Mgt, in a way that would be seamless for the users, and allow the users to make edits up until Feb 2025. Users are already using the completed field as part of our performance system, and I cannot change this part-way through a performance cycle.

I will now continue to pursue this issue via my SAP CSP as well.

Thanks,

Julia

entry.title: Re: Change dep. key when some areas are closed
entry.content:
You can consider using a time interval. 

Can you provide the error?

entry.title: Re: Create button unavailable in SAP RAP ODATA V4
entry.content: How can we implement create and edit button without draft?

entry.title: Re: FI-AA posting period management
entry.content:
The subledger AA should be closed before GL periods are closed. 
If all periods are closed in GL for 2022, then you should close 2022 in the Make Company Code Settings app. 

3436452 - Setting posting periods leads to error message FAA_CMP116https://me.sap.com/notes/3436452

entry.title: SBN-IBP Forecast Commit at Monthly level
entry.content:
Supplier wanted to commit the forecast at month level and send it back to IBP, but in IBP the KFs base PL are TW, 

While  sending data to SBN is okay as the TW is summed up to Monthly in SBN , however the monthly committed value in SBN when sent to  IBP, get stored at TW level ( beginning of the month TW) keeping other weeks as its  (Insert-Update) .

am i missing out something? or is there any option so that the monthly committed data when sent to IBP will be loaded at TW Planning level but desegregated to all TWs?

I am avoiding to create another Supplier commit KF in IBP at MTH level and copy it to main Supplier Commit  KF at TW level,

entry.title: Problem with a condition appearing twice in the price analysis.
entry.content:
I have a ZESP condition that has a calculation formula as it only needs to be determined for certain PO.

The scheme is

However, when I save an order, the condition is determined even though it should not be, and if I show the price analysis the condition appears twice, the first time it appears it indicates that the condition is ignored (that is formula 999  works correctly) and another record saying that yes he has found the condition (without condition record). 

 

 

If I make an "Update Prices" on the PO

the condition is determined correctly and stops appearing.
It also works if I remove the info record number from the PO item.

Can somebody help me.

Thanks.

entry.title: Error while importing CO2e Emissions from SAP SFM into SAP SCT
entry.content:
We integrated the SCT with the SFM with the BTP. When we try to import the CO2e Emissions we get the following error:

 

What does this mean? Why does it mention the S/4HANA source system?

 

We set up the Destination according this guide: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUS_SCT/351dea6ee9e343ffae825153b95671d6/2957cb324ee848feb51c0c4bfdf2b1c7.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One Integration with Document Information Extraction service enhancements
entry.content:
Hi Martin

When will the functionality be enabled for Guatemala's localization?

Regards, 

Armando.

entry.title: Topic Name Queue Event Mesh
entry.content:
hi,

I created a queue on the Event Mesh, how can I direct just one event to this queue? For example, when creating the Business Partner on S/4hana.

I saw that it is necessary to insert the topic name of the queue but it doesn't work for me.

but it only works when I enter * but in this case it intercepts all events:

 

Can you provide me with the string to insert in the topic name for the creation of the business partner?

thank you

entry.title: Re: Approval Process
entry.content:
Hi, 

You can try object type nº 140 (Payment Draft). The main table is OPDF, and PDF2 represent the lines (documents to be paid).

Put some validation to catch drafts from the same object (46) and same DocNum. Below you can find a simple join that might give you a clue about what to validate on your SP. 

SELECT
    opdf.DocNum
FROM OPDF
    INNER JOIN PDF2
        ON opdf.DocEntry = pdf2.DocNum
WHERE opdf.ObjType = 46

Hope it makes sense.
Felipe

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite - TPM - dynamic AS2 file name
entry.content:
Yes you can define expected value in Agreement Activity parameters  Let's take an example for Dynamic URL or file name. 

TPM URL receiver path  => http://google.com/as2/${property.messageType}

or File name  =>  Sample_${property.dirType}

messageType or dirType  you can define in activity parameters of your agreement and you can use it.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am from SAP in Germany, writing blogs about BTP and the Digital Transformation Journey at customers.

Best

Tim

entry.title: SAP IBP Inventory optimization Part 1
entry.content: SAP Integrated Business Planning for inventory recommends total inventory targets to maximize profit while buffering for uncertainty and maintaining customer service levels. Inventory optimization helps manage uncertainty in the supply chain by determining the amount of safety stock to hold at stocking locations within the supply chain. Safety stock absorbs uncertainty, allowing you to maintain customer service levels. Inventory optimization determines the optimal safety stock for each stocking location and recommends targets. This video covers basic master data, attributes Along with basic input and output key figures that I needed for a smooth functioning of inventory optimization,

entry.title: Re: Transitioning from Software Engineering to SAP Consulting
entry.content:
Hi @MalekWahmi - I would recommend that you join the Beginner Corner and the SAP Learning Group - you will get plenty of advice there, including the blog post from @David_Chaviano: How and where do you start a consulting career in SAP?
There are various Learning Journeys and SAP Certifications available.
Hope this helps and best of luck!

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Great to have you here @Tim_Kaufmann - let us know when you write your next one! 
Which part of Germany? We have a couple of location groups for cities there.

entry.title: Re: Eclipse GitHub Repositiry 421 error
entry.content: I have the same problem, I already searched several forums but I can't find how to solve it.

entry.title: Re: Eclipse GitHub Repositiry 421 error
entry.content: I have the same problem, I already searched several forums but I can't find how to solve it.

entry.title: Re: Near "Entity": syntax error in: UPDATE...
entry.content: please add a sample repository with detailed steps to reproduce your issue.

entry.title: Re: Learn how to configure SAP Build Process Automation tasks for SAP Task Center
entry.content:
Hello Priya, 

first of all thanks for providing this setup guide! 

There is one thing I would like to mention SAP Build Process Automation integration with SAP Task Center is supporting SAP Work Zone, standard edition only. Please see Restrictions for SAP Task Center Integration 

Would be great if you could adjust this in your blog post!

Best regards 

Stefanie

entry.title: Re: SAC Linked Analysis | RemoveDimensionFilter API
entry.content:
Hi,
linked analysis & unified story still have some limitations
please vote here: getDimensionFilters() for global linked-analysis-filters 
if .getDimensionFilters work than .remove... should also be available.
Atm. I prefer not using the built-in linked analysis and use the APIs listed here instead.
br
edgar

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
@teodora_popova, 

Hi,

currently there is no concrete plan when an advanced version of intercompany customer consignment process will be available.

Part of our current backlog is enabling advanced intercompany sales for free-of-charge items without external customer invoice relevance.
If and when we will work on this backlog is not decided, yet.

Best regards,
Bernd

entry.title: Re: Talent Intelligence Hub & SAP SuccessFactors Learning Integration
entry.content:
Dear @RinkyKarthik ,

Hello, following up on the requirement listed in this article that Job Profile Builder be enabled for the upgrade to Talent Intelligence Hub with Learning Integration.  Is this still the case as of 2H2023 or is that statement from an earlier understanding of the HXM TIH upgrade requirements where we might not previously have been able to migrate a Job Description Manager instance to Talent Intelligence Hub but now we can?  Thanks

entry.title: How to add Master data Attributes for "Product "Sold" in a Custom Analytical query?
entry.content:
We use a Fiori custom Analytical Query based on the I_Journalentryitemcube.

In the Query, we use the Reporting Dimension "Product Sold" (COPA Characteristic for the Material).

In Standart, the custom Analytical Query offers for "Product Sold" to Select/ display also a number of different Material master data fields (MM03) as "Attributes".

How can we extend the the list of Material master data fields in the given Attributes list and extend for customer specific Material master data fields, please? 

Which CDS views do we need to extend please?

Thank you!

Ralph

entry.title: What is the use of SAP AI Core and SAP AI Launchpad
entry.content:
SAP is always providing innovation solutions to be competitor with industry standards, as part of this SAP Introduced SAP AI Core and AI launchpad services in BTP.

What is the significance of SAP AI Core and AI Launchpad. How can I use these services in integrating with SAP Commerce.

Thank you

entry.title: SAP RAP Application Item node create button not visible Odata V2
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have created a custom RAP application with Header/Item data with Draft functionality using OData V2 service. While Preview service from Eclipse Create button at Item level is visible. 

But when the service is deployed using BAS on Public cloud system the Create button is not visible.

Can you guide me in this on why create button is not visible once OData v2 service is deployed and How can I make the create button visible.

 

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Print in mass Sales orders (ORDER_CONFIRMATION) in SAP S/4HANA cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

Our Customer would like to print in mass the Sales order forms (output: ORDER_CONFIRMATION).

To clarify: they want to print multiple sales orders forms at the same time.

Which SAP S/4HANA cloud app can we use for that?

Thank you for your help.

Regards,
Nelly GOMIS

entry.title: Where can I learn to apply SAP Activate methodology for S/4HANA implementation?
entry.content:
We  recommend to access our Discovering SAP Activate - Implementation Tools and Methodology learning journey 

Overview
This learning journey will enable you to apply SAP Activate methodology for S/4HANA implementation. It will also prepare you to work within an S/4HANA implementation project and attempt the SAP Associate Project Manager certification.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, you will gain an insight into the Methodology Foundation and introduced to SAP Cloud ALM. You will also explore the details of the workstreams. Cloud based models, as well as RISE with SAP, and possible transition paths will prepare you for Cloud and On-premise implementations using SAP Activate Methodology.

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

entry.title: Missing Positions (FinancialStatementItem) in benutzerdefinierte analytische Abfragen (OnPrem)
entry.content:
Hey,

es tut mir schon einmal im Vorwege leid, wenn ich an der falschen Stelle poste. 🙂

Ich erstelle eine benutzerdefinierte analytische Abfrage (App-ID:F1572) auf Basis dieses CDS-Views: I_MATRIXCONSOLIDATIONREPORTC.

Ich habe hier ein eingeschränktes Merkmal definiert und dies soll mit einer Spanne aus Positionen (FinancialStatementItem) hinterlegt werden. (Siehe Screenshot)

Das Problem:

Mir werden nur 20 Positionen zur Auswahl zur Verfügung gestellt, von insgesamt ca. 400.

Die Auswahl geht nur bis zum Beispiel Konto 141300. Es gibt aber noch mehr Positionen.

Warum kann ich keine weiteren Positionen auswählen?

Viele Grüße 🙂

entry.title: Re: Everything you need to know about: SAP SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub
entry.content:
@RinkyKarthik Within our Company we would like to configure the Talent Intelligence hub, how this configuration will have an impact on the Goals Management module?

To be more detailed, I am a bit concerned that this will have an impact on out Performance Campaign (which starts in July and ends in november). Is it true that the TIH will change automatically the Goal management? can you share more details?

entry.title: Re: POD message not triggering in Order POD
entry.content:
Have you enabled POD Notifications in POD Designer? See: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/pod-designer/pod-notification-options

 

Br,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: @Katherine_K I am from Walldorf.

entry.title: Re: Unable to send customized emails using Alerts 2.0 in...
entry.content:
Hi,
I'm afraid customizing the alert email body is currently not possible ootb. As a work around, you could evaluate using a different / external mail service to send mails, where you would have full control and be able to build your own body message.
Br,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: POD message not triggering in Order POD
entry.content:
Hi Manoel,

Thanks for your reply. I have already enabled all notifications that are available in POD designer and also I have selected Order POD in POD connection in design production process. 

 

Regards, 

Kartik

entry.title: Re: Live session on AI Features and Capabilities in SAP Service Cloud Version 2
entry.content:
Hi @clovismuller @vitazz : 

Expert-Guided Live Sessions are part of the commercial subscriptions: old Professional Edition, old Partner Edition, old Solution Editions, new LH SKU and new LH SKU for Partners.

so yes we would need LH license.

Regards

Svetha

entry.title: Re: POD message not triggering in Order POD
entry.content:
Have you also added Work Center AND Resource to your PPD? See: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/pod-designer/pod-notification-options

 

Note

The Subscription options that you select when configuring POD Notifications in the POD Designer must match the metadata that you designate in the Conditions to Select POD section of the POD Connection configuration in the Design Production Processes app. For more information, see: Controls

For example, when configuring POD Notifications in the POD Designer, you select Work Center and Resource in the Subscription section and ensure that Production Process is one of the events selected in the Event section. Then, when configuring Conditions to Select for POD in the Design Production Processes app, you ensure that the production process sends processes to the POD that are listening for both the same Work Center and Resource by designating the same Work Center and Resource that you selected when configuring POD Notifications in the POD Designer.

entry.title: Re: POD message not triggering in Order POD
entry.content: Yes manoel, I have added Work center as well as Resource

entry.title: Line Monitor
entry.content:
Hello experts,

i'm testing the Line Monitor POD and the OEE insights only show the availability. No KPIs on qualitity or performance are displayed. 

When configuring the plugin in the pod designer, you can set which KPI should be displayed. There are four options: OEE, availability, performance and qualitity. By default, all are set to OEE. Using a copy of the standard pod, I set these to the corresponding KPIs. However, this did not help, as the availability is no longer displayed. I do not understand the logic behind this plugin, most likely I just forgot something.

Before customizing:

After customizing:

 

If someone could help me it would be great.

Thanks & Regards,
Patrik

entry.title: Re: Default scope for service key
entry.content:
Hello Martin,

I found a blog which may help you with your third question.

First of all the blog which explains a solution to your problem very detailed: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-call-protected-app-from-external-app-as-external-user-with-scope/ba-p/13440813

I recreated the steps from the blog and I was able to issue a token with the client-id and secret from a service key which has a specific scope.

I created an xsuaa-instance with the following json-configuration:

{
    "xsappname" : "test-provider-xsuaa",
    "tenant-mode": "dedicated",
    "oauth2-configuration": {
        "credential-types": ["binding-secret"]
    },
    "scopes": [{
        "name": "$XSAPPNAME.testscope",
        "grant-as-authority-to-apps" : ["$XSAPPNAME(application,test-client-xsuaa)"]
    }],
	"role-templates": [ { 
      "name"                : "TestProviderRoleTemplate", 
      "default-role-name"   : "TestProviderRoleTemplate",
      "scope-references"    : ["$XSAPPNAME.testscope"]
  }]
}

In the scope "testscope" you need to refer to another xsuaa-instance via "grant-as-authority-to-apps". "application" is the service plan and "test-client-xsuaa" is the name of the service-instance. 

Then I created a xsuaa service-instance with the name "test-client-xsuaa":

{
    "xsappname" : "test-client-xsuaa",
    "tenant-mode": "dedicated",
    "oauth2-configuration": {
        "credential-types": ["binding-secret"]
    },
    "authorities" : ["$XSAPPNAME(application,test-provider-xsuaa).testscope"]
}

In "authorities" you need to refer to the service-instance created before and define the scope "testscope". I then created a service key for the instance "test-client-xsuaa", issued a token with it's client-secret and client-id and checked the token on jwt.io. The token contains the scope "testscope".

Using this pattern you can issue tokens from a service key containg a specific scope by creating new xsuaa-instances for each scope.

Best regards

Torben

entry.title: Re: POD message not triggering in Order POD
entry.content: If POD Notification and POD Connection settings are correct, it should work. I suggest you review my blog post: https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-blogs-by-sap/send-real-time-pod-notifications-to-workers-using-production-processes/ba-p/13575785 and if you still face issues, raise a ticket for development support. Br, Manoel

entry.title: Re: HR_TIME_RESULTS_IN_INTERVAL How to restrict the data...
entry.content:
AFAIK the actual date is 

wa-date = time_results_wa-begda+(06) && time_results_wa-zes-reday

perform the concatenate before merging every zes table in a single table related to different days

entry.title: In S4 Hana public cloud, is it OK to delete locked business users?
entry.content:
In S4 Hana public cloud, is it OK to delete locked business users in the 'Maintain Business Users' app?

There is a delete button, but just wanted to check if anybody has hit any problems after deletion.  For example, any transactional data entered by the deleted user, could that cause an issue?

Many Thanks

Alan Roddie

entry.title: Pop-up message on latest home page for users to acknowledge a statement
entry.content:
Hi all 

Is there a way to create a pop-up message on the latest home page for users to acknowledge a statement? I have tried the supplemental task, but it only displays as a To Do item.

Thank you and kind regards, Liezl

entry.title: XSL Mapping
entry.content:
When executing the operation mapping with my XSL transformation getting the error "Error when parsing an XML document (The markup in the document following the root element must be well-formed.)"

Below is my XSL

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ns0:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:ns0="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:wfm="http://www.avangrid.com/wfm/" xmlns:opt="http://www.clicksoftware.com/OptionalParameters" xmlns:xsl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
<ns0:template match="/">
<ns1:Header>
<ns2:OptionalParameters xmlns:ns2="http://www.clicksoftware.com/OptionalParameters">
<ns2:CallerIdentity>EAI_SAPGLB</ns2:CallerIdentity>
<ns2:ErrorOnNonExistingDictionaries>true</ns2:ErrorOnNonExistingDictionaries>
</ns2:OptionalParameters>
</ns1:Header>
<ns1:Body>
<ns1:copy-of select="*"/>
</ns1:Body>
</ns0:template>
</ns0:stylesheet>

The header has to close before the body tag.

provide me the solution for the above

entry.title: Re: Line Monitor
entry.content:
Hi Patrik,

If only Availability KPI is calculating, you might be missing some configuration steps. Have you created standard rates, and did all the needed setup? Learn more at https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/overall-equipment-effectiveness

Regarding Line Monitor OEE KPIs plugin in Line Monitor POD (Default), they are not all set to OEE by default, I suggest you double check it again and adjust your copy accordingly. It seems to me you might be mixing the default POD with your copy. 🙂

Hope it helps,

Br,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Service overview and Service Order Processing
entry.content: Thanks for this. I'd be interested in knowing what specifically is new for CS in S/4 and/or the release you reference.  All of this looks like the same CS functionality with some different Fiori screens.

entry.title: Re: POD message not triggering in Order POD
entry.content: Let me try it.

entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 2
entry.content:
My reference for week 1:

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/march-developer-challenge-cloudevents-week-1/td-p/13629129#:~:text=%7B%0A%22specversion%22%3A%20%221.0%22%2C%0A%22id%22%3A%20%2262706ed3%2D3f4c%2D4a48%2Da2e7%2D8f201301822b%22%2C%0A%22type%22%3A%20%22.com.alpesadevcha.v1%22%2C%0A%22source%22%3A%20%22/alpesadev/test%22%2C%0A%22time%22%3A%20%222024%2D03%2D07T08%3A00%3A00Z%22%2C%0A%22datacontenttype%22%3A%20%22application/json%22%2C%0A%22data%22%3A%20%7B%0A%09%22employee%22%3A%20%2280001000%22%0A%09%7D%0A%7D

 

My JS code:

const { CloudEvent, HTTP} = require("cloudevents");

// Create a new CloudEvent
const ce = new CloudEvent({ 
  "specversion": "1.0",
  "id": "62706ed3-3f4c-4a48-a2e7-8f201301822b",
  "type": ".com.alpesadevcha.v1",
  "source": "/alpesadev/test",
  "time": "2024-03-07T08:00:00Z",
  "datacontenttype": "application/json",
  "data": {
    "employee": "80001000"
    }
}); 

//
const { headers, body } = HTTP.structured(ce);

console.log(
   "Headers:", "\n",
    JSON.stringify(headers, null, 2), "\n",
    "Body:", "\n",
    JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(body), null, 2));

Output:

Headers: 
 {
  "content-type": "application/cloudevents+json; charset=utf-8"
}
 Body:
 {
  "id": "62706ed3-3f4c-4a48-a2e7-8f201301822b",
  "time": "2024-03-07T08:00:00.000Z",
  "type": ".com.alpesadevcha.v1",
  "source": "/alpesadev/test",
  "specversion": "1.0",
  "datacontenttype": "application/json",
  "data": {
    "employee": "80001000"
  }
}

Alle Infos zum Event findest du hier SAP Stammtisch 04.04.2024

Tritt der Gruppe Wien bei und subscribe den Blog-Post SAP Stammtisch Wien, um über zukünftige Events informiert zu werden!

Große Pfarrgasse 2
1020 Wien

entry.title: Re: Eclipse errors after installing ADT Tools
entry.content: I reinstalled eclipse and adt.

entry.title: Automatic payment program - Generating XML payment file before Payment run
entry.content:
Hello 

Came across an odd requirement where client's AP team wants to generate an payment XML file before actually running the Payment posting. Please note that they are not yet on SAP. 

The purpose behind this step is that they take this XML file to the bank website where it gets validated. If they find any error, they scrap the run (till now only proposal is done) and redo after correction. If there are no errors, they go ahead with Payment posting in F110.

Just wanted to get an idea if this is something possible within F110 ?

entry.title: Re: ABAP Platform for SAP S/4HANA 2023

Thank you for your question. 
The functionality described refers to the SAP Build Process Automation on SAP BTP. The presentation and the documentation will be updated accordingly. 

Kind regards, 
Carine

Thank you

entry.title: Re: HTML5 Application 403 Forbidden error while calling C...
entry.content:
Hi, 

even if your admin claims that UCON is not turned on, the message is clearly a message from UCON. It is not allowing the request you made. The easiest approach is to check on backend side why this happens. 

Best regards,
Markus

Regards,

entry.title: Re: POD message not triggering in Order POD
entry.content:
Hi @ksinghal , I just tried and it works just fine in Order POD as well, with a small remark, see details below.

This is my Order POD setup:

My PPD setup:

When I run the PPD:

Notification shows in Order POD just fine:

The remark here is that Order POD only subscribes to POD Notifications in the Details page, after a Phase is selected. So in Order POD main page, POD Messages will not show, because the POD is not yet subscribed.

Hope it helps,

Manoel

entry.title: #COE #BA01 Deleting an errant unposted Invoice Cancelation
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a situation where someone cancelled in error a customer invoice that was posted and cleared/paid in 2023.

We're trying to get rid of this invoice cancellation sd billing document which has not been posted as financial document (it is blocked based on the 2023 period not being open), how do we do this in S/4HANA Public Cloud? 

We do not see a delete option for it and we absolutely do not want it posted as a journal entry since it was errant.

Based on searches in the knowledge base and forums we see old ECC postings referencing Note 388489 - Cancelation of a cancelation document, however this note doesn't appear available to us any longer.

Best,

Ryan

entry.title: Re: #COE #BA01 Greece VAT Registration Number not appeari...
entry.content: @Dave_He It is a govt requirement, why would I need to raise it as an influence item for other customers to vote on? At a minimum it should be addressed thru a BAdI.

entry.title: How to overcome an HTTP error 421 occured: SSL handshake error with the abapGIT plugin in Steampunk
entry.content:
When trying to add a new repository from GitHub.com I ran into the problem that the following error message was shown:

HTTP error 421 occured: SSL handshake with github.com:443 failed: SSSLERR_PEER_CERT_UNTRUSTED (-102)

The error is due to the new SSL root certificate that is used on github.com since March the 7th.

entry.title: Migration cockpit in fiori
entry.content:
During lsmw, in the final step, we get a option for "display errors only".

With that feature, the system stops the mass upload whenever it finds an error.

And until the user inputs the correct data the lsmw will not continue. This is a very good feature, so that the data upload will continue after the correct data input.

I need to know that Likewise is there any same feature or option while we load data through migration cockpit in fiori?

 

If yes then please let me know.

 

Cheers.

entry.title: SAP DM: Use OEE Time Model Elements to calculate and send Activity Confirmations to SAP ERP
entry.content:
Hello,

we are at a highly automated machine workcenter and using the Order POD for Production Orders and I am looking for a way to report the activty confirmations (Setup Time, Machining Time, Labor time) to ERP without entering the the values manually in the Plugin "Activity Confirmation". The idea is the following process:

- We use the Plugin "Start" to start working on the SFC. At the the time the Resource status should change to a predefined status represening a loading time. Of course the reason code will be assigned to the OEE Time Model element "Loading time". 

- After loading the machine setter is changing the machine status to productive. In the background the accured setup time (time between pressing start until changing the machine status) should be sent to ERP as activity "Setup time". 

- Simliar logic should apply for time in production.

Do you see this as a realistic way with the production designer? Or do you see another way to realise the integration of machine status and Activity Confirmation

entry.title: Re: How to overcome an HTTP error 421 occured: SSL handsh...
entry.content:
Using the Maintain Certificate Trust List App in your SAP BTP ABAP Environment system you can update the prefilled list of certificates that is delivered by SAP.

As described in the Online Help of the Maintain Certificate Trust List App you should first try to update the prefilled list of trusted certificates:

"...SAP delivers its systems with pre-defined trusted certificates. If the trusted certificates change at a later point in time, there are no automatic updates. We therefore recommend that you use the Check for Updates function on a regular basis and adopt any changes to certificate trusts that you require."

If this does not help because the certificate is not on the list even after you have refreshed the list you can (as a workaround) upload the certicate of the web site (in this case GitHub.com) you want to connect to as a certificate that is "Managed by Customer" as shown in the following screen shots. 

My colleagues are working on updating the list of trusted certificates, but in the meantime you would have to use the aforementioned workaround.

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud - Product Pictures on Sales Quotation Ou...
entry.content:
Hello k_ohlhoff 

 

The display of product images is currently not available in S/4HANA Cloud .

 

Please check the KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/2749903

 

Its missing functionality . I havent seen a workaround for this issue

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: SAP DM: Use OEE Time Model Elements to calculate and...
entry.content:
Hi,

I suggest you evaluate using Time Tracking capability via APIs/Services in Production Processes, see Labor On and Manage Time Tracking as well.

Learn more with these assets:

  • Time Tracking within SAP Digital Manufacturing
  • Time Tracking in SAP Digital Manufacturing
  • Time Tracking in Order POD Video within SAP Digital Manufacturing

Hope it helps,

Manoel

We want to store our employee's Visa & Immigration information (specific to USA) in SuccessFactors. 

Since SAP is going to deprecate the standard Visa & Immigration portlet, is there any alternative solution?

Thanks

Raghu K

HRIS Manager

entry.content: XCO_CP_XLSX? Also, volunteers to adapt abap2xlsx to the Cloud are welcome.

entry.title: Re: Cross-System Workflow for SAP SuccessFactors Solutions
entry.content:
Hi Sharath, hope you're doing great, and thank you for sharing this content!

Please, if possible, I'd like to receive your valuable help with the following scenario:

  • Customer is asking if it is currently possible to create a position automatically in SF/EC based on the approval of a specific WF step.

Searching for EC configuration only, I can't find any configuration available to trigger this process.

Thinking on this cross-system-workflow and the BTP layer, is it possible to think in a trigger on the BTP layer, which after a specific step triggers this Position creation, and then inform the necessary Person/Team? The idea is that the WF runs only on the EC side.

Really appreciate any input or recommendation.

Best Regards.

Thiago Eva

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation Agent 3 Updates and Key Benefits
entry.content:
The end of 2022 was marked with the launch of SAP Build Process Automation Agent Version 3. Since then, we've received great feedback for its enhanced experience, performance, and innovative features !

For those who have yet to transition from the older version 2 of the Agent, let's delve into the compelling reasons to upgrade to Agent 3, propelling you into a future of amplified capabilities and streamlined business processes.

 

Effortless Installation and Automatic Upgrade Governance

Bid farewell to complex installations of the Agent with the streamlined one-click download of the Agent 3 directly accessible from your SAP Build Process Automation tenant.

Our commitment to a hassle-free experience extends to automatic upgrades in a secure and controlled manner, reducing workload for IT administrators and ensuring a reliable up-to-date automation environment.

 

In March 2024, we release two new enhancements for a more efficient and robust agent governance :

  • Automatic regeneration of your user credentials in RBSC (manually activated by administrators)
  • Progressive version upgrade with the Automatic Mode, allowing you to test versions with beta agents (configured as early adopters of the newly released version) before upgrading all production agents.

 

Innovation at Your Fingertips

Embrace a richer product with extended functional coverage by adopting SAP Build Process Automation Agent 3.

Over the past year, we introduced numerous capabilities and connectors, automating Microsoft 365 and Java-based applications, emulators (i.e. HLLAPI) and more. Explore innovative solutions with Agent 3's expanded toolkit, catering to enterprise-like scenarios such as Remote Desktop Protocol management on Windows Servers or soon, enabling Offline Mode to ensure business continuity.

 

Performance and Quality Improvements

Benefit from significant performance boosts with SAP Build Process Automation Agent 3, ensuring smooth and efficient automations. The front-end, based on the Electron framework, offers a more responsive UI, enabling faster project switching, theming, and seamless transitions from design to test to runtime modes. The commitment to improved performance and quality guarantees reliable automation outcomes.

Intuitive Redesigned UI

The redesigned user interface in Agent 3 caters to end-users, citizen developers, and IT administrators alike, who will appreciate its simplicity and easy navigation, enhancing efficiency in designing and managing automations.

 

In conclusion, the future of seamless automation using Agent 3 awaits, offering easier installation, innovation, improved performance with a user-friendly interface.

As we look ahead, note that the Agent 2 on SAP Build Process Automation tenants will reach the end of maintenance on June 30th, 2024, and for SAP Intelligent RPA tenants on June 30th, 2025. The time to migrate is now, and we've got you covered with a comprehensive migration tutorial, ensuring a smooth and secure transition from Agent 2 to Agent 3. Don't delay—start your migration journey today and unlock the full potential of SAP Build Process Automation Agent 3!

 

Useful Links : 
  • SAP Process Automation “Agent 3” Now Available – The Gold Standard of Desktop Automation : Blog Post by @marcin_jakubik 
  • SAP Best Practices to migrate from Agent 2 to Agent 3 : Blog Post by @jleonard 
  • End of Maintenance dates for Desktop Agent 2 on SAP Intelligent Process Automation and SAP Build Process Automation : SAP Note 3440715

 

For more information on SAP Process Automation:
  • Exchange knowledge: SAP Community | Q&A| Blogs
  • Explore: SAP Product Page | Product Demo
  • Try SAP Process Automation For Free: Get Started | SAP Help Portal


And make sure to follow us on LinkedIn, Twitter, and YouTube for regular content, events, and contests!

entry.title: Technical Extensions in Convergent Invoicing (Private Cloud and On-Premise)
entry.content:
With technical extension concept, you can logically enhance billable items by linking to entries in customer tables. This could be any type of data, e.g. industry specific data like usage data in utilities or high tech industry.

Use technical extension, e.g. if the structure of your customer data is more complex and you like to link data from a set of customer table to a billable item. Or you may reduce redundancy and link to customer data via technical extension instead of storing same data in multiple billable items.

Please find details as follows:

entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 1
entry.content:
{
  "specversion": "1.0",
  "type": "com.example.iot.power.consumption",
  "source": "https://example.talmeida.com/devices",
  "subject": "power-measurement",
  "id": "bafa9642-563b-4ff5-b697-58d91a77b988",
  "time": "2024-03-10 10:00:00",
  "datacontenttype": "application/json",
  "data": { 
    "id": "power-measurement-bafa9642-563b-4ff5-b697-58d91a77b988",
    "description": "Power measurement",
    "measure": "10",
	"unit": "Wh"
  }
}

My submission. Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Fully-Activated Appliance: Create your SAP S/4HANA system in a fraction of the usual
entry.content:
Hi Joerg,

We are interested in installing the SAP S/4HANA 2023 Fully-Activated Appliance on-premise as described by your blog and OSS note 2041140. We do have an S/4 HANA License that we can use to apply to the appliance after installed. The question that I have is do we need a CAL license if we are installing on-premise instead of on a Cloud provider?

Thanks,

Gregg Hinkle

entry.title: Re: User Exit for inbound DEBMAS IDOC
entry.content: Hi, I tried with the similar steps but while testing it is not reaching to the point of exit i.e EXIT_SAPLVV02_001

entry.title: How to design sales prices in SAP S/4HANA and be ready for future innovations
entry.content:
Agility and flexibility to adopt innovations are great values that businesses must have. Using SAP S/4HANA tools to design business processes ensures the company assumes quick innovations.

This blog summarizes for you the tools for SAP S/4HANA Sales Price management that allow faster software deployment and easier adoption of SAP innovations and new business requirements.

We can start with the usual customer requirements regarding managing sales Prices:

  • Transparency, simplicity, and agility to maintain sales prices
  • Approval for release prices
  • Integration with other systems
  • Initial Price Migration.
  • Customs fields
  • Events
  • Analytical reports
  • Authorizations

Let's review the tools that SAP S/4HANA offers to us to cover each requirement.

 

Transparency, simplicity, and agility to maintain sales prices.

Available since the S/4HANA 2020 release, the SAP Fiori app. Manage Prices – Sales (ID F4111) enables the following actions:

  • Search for existing condition records with filter criteria.
  • Create one or more condition records simultaneously.
  • Define pricing scales for condition records.
  • Send one or more condition records for approval.
  • Copy selected condition records to new ones.
  • Edit condition records.
  • Import condition records.
  • View import history.
  • Delete selected condition records.

You can see more detail in these videos:           

  • How to Set Sales Prices
  • Manage Sales Prices - Import

Available since the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition release 2023 FPS1 release, SAP Fiori app. Manage Tax Rates - Sales  ( F6972 ) can be used to manage sales taxes.

 

Approval for release prices

As of the SAP S/4HANA 2022 release, you can design custom workflow processes. This include defining preconditions under which a price must be approved and selecting approvers who will receive the approval request for the price in the SAP Fiori app—my Inbox (ID F0862). All approval request notifications are accessible in the SAP Fiori Launchpad.

The workflow is easy, flexible, and intuitive to configure, the business owner have the master key to modify it according to their needs of the moment (for example, change of approvers or prerequisites).

For more detail please, see in How to manage Workflows for Sales Price in SAP S/4HANA ? | SAP Blogs

Additionally, you can route requests to teams instead of specific individuals, this allows you to have independency between the workflow configuration and the Teams configuration. For more details on this topic, you can see in:    Flexible Workflow using Responsibility Management in SAP S/4HANA

 

Integration with other systems.

Best practices for integrating with other system is through SAP delivered standard Integrations on standard APIs (OData and SOAP). For Sales Prices Master Data, you have these APIs:

API

Technical Name

Description

Condition Record for Pricing in Sales

API_SLSPRICINGCONDITIONRECORD_SRV

This synchronous inbound service enables you to create, read, update, and delete condition records for pricing that are used in Sales.

Condition Record for Pricing in Sales - Replicate

CO_SDCM_ESR_SALES_PRICING_COND_SPRX

This asynchronous outbound service enables you to replicate condition records for pricing that are used in Sales to external systems.

 

For more details regarding APIs for Sales Prices, you can review APIs for Sales | SAP Help Portal

 

Initial Price Migration.

SAP S/4HANA customers can take advantage of reliable migration approaches built into SAP S/4HANA using the SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit together with a set of predefined data migration objects. You can see the migration object available for Sales Prices in SAP S/4HANA  here: Condition record for pricing (general template) | SAP Help Portal

As I shared with you, in the Fiori app SAP Fiori app. Manage Prices – Sales ( ID F4111 )you can import condition records from Excel. You can use this feature to facilitate initial migration data loads.  Please note that the recommended maximum file size using this load option is limited to 3 MB.

 

Customs fields

You can create your own custom fields and enhancement implementations to customize applications and their UIs, reports, e-mail templates, and form templates.  For Sales Prices case, you can create a custom field and use it as a field in the condition records.

For example, I had created this field to use in a condition record:

In my case, I need the field in the “Manage Prices app.” and “Tax Rates – Sales app.” I also want to use them in the template for importing condition records, so I enabled them like this:

After these settings, you will find the custom field in the Catalog for Pricing in Sales:

 

And here, used by a custom condition table:

 

Events

A business event is a message sent to notify a system consumer that an SAP Object Type has changed. That message will be manipulated by a middleware ( for example CPI or Event Mesh in BTP ) and from there an action is generated on an other platform.

Sales Pricing Condition Record Events has the business object Sales Pricing Condition Record Events and can trigger the following events:

Created / Changed / Deleted When a condition record is created/changed/deleted, the event is raised and informs the Condition record, condition type, and other condition records for which the validity period is altered due to an overlap with the condition record for which the event was raised.

ValdtyPerdChanged This event is raised when the validity period of a condition record is changed. Inform Condition record, condition type, the valid-to-date of the condition record and the valid-from date of the condition record.

AmountChanged This event is raised when the condition amount of a condition record is changed. Inform the Condition record, condition type, the condition amount of the condition record and the currency key for the condition amount.

RatioChanged This event is raised when the condition percentage of a condition record is changed. Inform the Condition record, condition type, the condition percentage of the condition record and a percent sign.

For more information about business events: Business Events on SAP Business Accelerator Hub.

 

Analytical reports.

The SAP Fiori Pricing Elements - Flexible Analysis app. helps the Pricing Specialist to review the uses of the condition records in sales documents. The app allows the user to focus on their specific analytic needs.

In this example, we want to review Discounts given to customers in the last 400 days in billing documents:

At the top right, you have filters to use. In our test case, we need only the last 400 days. You can also configure dimensions in the app on the left side and rows and columns for your analysis.

In our test case, we want to include ( drag and drop ) as rows: Sales Organization, condition type, condition category (to filter only discounts), and condition document (to filter only invoices).

As measure: The condition value.

The CDS views (either released by SAP or customized) are used to expose business data - stored in database tables - in a format that is based on business semantics making it easy for the users to consume.  A custom analytical app may be used in some case cases to provide a custom view of this data. For more details regarding CDS views you can see CDS Views for Sales

 

Authorizations.

As of version S/4HANA 2023 Cloud Private Edition, you can configure the appropriate role and authorization to access the information in the price element area of the respective documents. So, you can define authorization objects that can display and change condition records across sales documents.

For example you can, in order to restrict the ability of Sales Representative to change customer discounts in sales orders. You may alternatively grant the Sales Manager the necessary permissions to change customer discounts in sales orders.  The resulting views for each role when changing a sales orders will be the following:

Sales Manager                                                                     

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Sales Representative

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

For more detail, you can see an example here: Example for Setting Up Role-Based Access | SAP Help Portal

 

We have reached the end of the blog post and I hope it was helpful for you!

I'm looking forward to your feedback and thoughts or clarification questions you may have in the comment section below.

Thank you,

Brought to you by the SAP S/4HANA RIG team.

entry.title: API Specification for older releases
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking at the SAP S/4 Hana API for reading Accounting Documents (https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_OPLACCTGDOCITEMCUBE_SRV_0001/overview).

Specifically, I need to use an older release version of this API as the target system is 2022 FPS02.

But choosing a different release version from the dropdown menu doesn't seem to actually allow you to download the version you want, the downloaded spec still uses the latest API.

 

How can we download past API versions?

entry.title: Re: How to read value entered in an inputcontrol of advan...
entry.content:
@innokeyits 

Add a slider and configure it as per your needs. You will not be able to use Data Action trigger in this case. So you can use button to trigger the Data Action. I have set the target version as Actuals but you can assign it from input control or dropdown etc. as per your requirement.

Button with script on press

var factor=Slider_1.getValue();
DataAction_1.setParameterValue("Factor",factor);
DataAction_1.setParameterValue("TargetVersion","public.Actual");
if(DataAction_1.execute()){
Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Success,"DA run succesfully");
Application.refreshData();
}

I also create a parameter in Data Action to accept this slider value.

Simple Advanced Formula

MEMBERSET [d/ZACCOUNT_TEST]="SALARY"
MEMBERSET [d/Date]="202401"

DATA([d/ZACCOUNT_TEST]="SALARYPREV12")=RESULTLOOKUP()*%Factor%

 

Output:

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Link abapGit repository issue: "SSL handshake with github.com:443 failed"
entry.content:
See my post here:
Solved: How to overcome an HTTP error 421 occured: SSL han... - SAP Community
in the trial systems I have uploaded the new certificate so that it should work there again.

entry.title: Re: Story might already be deleted or did not exist in th...
entry.content:
@pranavvyas01 

I think deleting the story might have caused the issue. Can you try saving the story with save as new name in source and try transporting this new story to target.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Best Practices - S/4 Fiori Launchpad (FLP) App Usage Analytics: Using SAP UI5 BSP repository and
entry.content:
This so-called "blog" should be removed. It provides no information about anything, a bunch of links to general oss Notes, a github link to a proprietary Fiori app that you have to pay for, and a bunch of useless powerpoint diagrams. The author clearly just wanted to be a "blogger" without having much to say. 

The funniest part is the list of "Key Backend Transactions".... the first one is /ui2/flp. LoL, and the second one is SE80...  🤣

.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Customer Influence Q4 2023
entry.content:
Hello @Orla_C ; 
A quick question regarding " Calendar : Time Zone support for calendar Series". If I understand correctly you mentioned that moving forward the configured time won't change after a DST.

If I calendar tasks series run everynight at 11PM it will be even after the DST ; not an hour later (or before). But SAP influence blog seems to say the opposite : 

I had indeed an infinite "in progress" task since last sunday (DST for Canada). 

Do you know how we can be sure it won't happened again ? 
Thank you !

entry.title: Re: Staging bay not assigned to ODO or WT when door assig...
entry.content: Your question was on why was the system assigning a different bin than defined. The answer is the Staging Area/ Door Determination Group is derived from Product master and isn't the doors you defined or select.

entry.title: Re: SAP DATASPHERE IS AN ALTERNATIVE OF SAP HANA MODELLING WITH MORE FEATURES
entry.content: This answer not available anymore.
